_doc: Wood Storage — visible storage prop for the wood resource. PR #4.0 (revised 2026-05-07): uses the same InventoryStack + StackSystem pipeline as the player so logs stack identically. slotCapacity 30 caps the visible tower. anchorOffset.y = 0.55 sits the stack base just above the pad's top surface. Visual ID: amber body + golden rim cap. 2026-05-11: `spawn.cost` added so the right-edge SpawnMenu BUILD ▸ Wood Box chip can read the cost and gate placement. Cost derives from balance.economy.wood_storage.
